reason: test.sh oracle only runs PASS-TO-PASS tests and never runs any FAIL-TO-PASS tests (test_html_s3_path_removed, test_s3_report_bucket_exists_in_settings, etc.). This gives nop_reward=1 instead of 0, since all pass-to-pass tests pass on the base commit. The oracle cannot discriminate base from fixed. This is a test infrastructure problem (test.sh) — instruction.md changes have no effect on test outcomes.
